motion_policy: deterministic source-preserving static motion: zoom/pan/frost/thaw/cell overlays; no AI-generated frog bodies; no paid video credits
voice_note: Temporary/internal TTS if provider is not approved elevenlabs_george; do not publish without approved voice.

beats.voiceover: In winter, ice can form through much of its body.
beats.caption:
ICE FORMS
THROUGH ITS BODY

beats.voiceover: Its heart can stop for a while.
beats.caption:
ITS HEART
CAN STOP

beats.voiceover: Sugar-like fluids help protect the cells.
beats.caption:
SUGAR HELPS
PROTECT CELLS

beats.voiceover: Then spring warms it up, and the frog starts moving again.
beats.caption:
SPRING WARMS IT
BACK TO LIFE

beats.voiceover: It is not magic. It is survival chemistry.
beats.caption:
NOT MAGIC
SURVIVAL CHEMISTRY
